meaning: n.无性系,无性繁殖,克隆v.无性繁殖,复制
examples: A team from the UK were the first to successfully clone an animal.
He knows her clone may not have her temperament.
Every man wants his son to be somewhat of a clone.
Mitalipov, senior author on the paper, laughs when asked if he wants to clone a person.
In my opinion, now is not the time to bet your startup on a Twitter clone.
